sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Precision Trading with Forum Energy Technologies Inc. (FET) Risk Zones
feed.summary: This article provides a precision trading analysis for Forum Energy Technologies Inc. (FET), highlighting positive near-term sentiment while noting a weak mid-term bias within a long-term strength context. It details specific institutional trading strategies including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, complete with entry zones, targets, and stop losses. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal strengths, support, and resistance levels to guide trading decisions.

feed.title: NUGO Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:NUGO
feed.summary: This article provides detailed information on the Nuveen Growth Opportunities ETF (NUGO), including its current price, NAV, AUM, and performance metrics. It highlights NUGO's investment strategy, which focuses on actively managed, concentrated portfolios of U.S. large-cap companies. The article also includes technical analysis, fund characteristics, and answers frequently asked questions about ETFs and NUGO specifically.

feed.title: Navigator Holdings shareholder to sell 7M shares; company to buy back 3.5M
feed.summary: BW Group Limited is offering 7,000,000 shares of Navigator Holdings' common stock in a secondary offering, while Navigator Holdings itself will repurchase 3,500,000 shares from the underwriters using cash on hand. This buyback follows a 34% surge in Navigator's stock over the past year, with the company trading at an attractive P/E ratio of 13.01 and a PEG ratio of 0.52. The company, which operates a fleet of liquefied gas carriers, recently reported mixed Q4 2025 earnings, missing EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations.

feed.title: NJNK Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:NJNK
feed.summary: This article provides comprehensive details on the Columbia U.S. High Yield ETF (NJNK), including its current price, key statistics like AUM and dividend yield, and its investment strategy. It covers the fund's asset allocation, technical analysis, and answers frequently asked questions about ETFs and NJNK's performance. The fund aims to provide high current income through investments in high-yield corporate bonds from U.S. companies.

feed.title: Linking wells to facilities: How digital tools are reshaping oil and gas production
feed.summary: Digital tools are transforming oil and gas production by connecting wells, facilities, and pipelines, allowing operators to move from fragmented data to actionable insights. SLB's OptiFlow, OptiSite, and Tela AI assistant integrate data and workflows across the entire production lifecycle, enhancing performance, reliability, and decision-making. These innovations enable a shift from monitoring individual assets to managing entire systems holistically, leading to more efficient and coordinated operations.

feed.title: UDR Raises Quarterly Dividend to $0.435 per Share, Payable April 30 to Shareholders of Record on April 15
feed.summary: UDR, Inc. has announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.435 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on April 30, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of April 15, 2026. The announcement is part of the company's regular financial updates to its investors.

feed.title: JP Morgan Maintains 'Overweight' on VST, Raises Target Price | V
feed.summary: JP Morgan has reiterated its 'Overweight' rating on Vistra (VST) and increased its price target from $239.00 to $240.00. This decision reflects continued confidence in Vistra's market position and growth potential, despite varying analyst actions from other firms in recent months. Vistra, a major power producer and retail energy provider in the USA, has an average target price of $221.75 from 18 analysts, implying a 32.49% upside from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a slight downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust (CPT) Enters into Fifth Amended and Restated Credit Agreement
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (CPT) has executed its Fifth Amended and Restated Credit Agreement, extending the maturity of its revolving credit facility from August 2026 to March 2030, with options for further extensions. This agreement removes a $300 million unsecured term loan and provides flexibility in interest rate selection based on SOFR or a base rate. The funds will be used for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment, development, and acquisitions, aiming to maintain financial health and operational flexibility.

feed.title: The Southern Company (SO) Announces $1.3 Billion Junior Subordinated Notes Offering
feed.summary: The Southern Company (SO) has announced its plan to issue $1.3 billion in 6.00% Fixed-to-Fixed Reset Rate Junior Subordinated Notes, maturing on April 1, 2058. This strategic financial move, registered under the Securities Act of 1933, aims to optimize the company's capital structure and support long-term growth objectives. The offering involves collaborations with several major financial institutions acting as underwriters.

feed.title: Indiana American Water Announces More Than $246 Million Invested in 2025 Statewide Infrastructure Upgrades
feed.summary: Indiana American Water announced over $246 million in planned infrastructure investments for 2025 across its service area. These upgrades aim to enhance system reliability and water quality, including new treatment plants, water mains, and lead service line replacements. The company emphasizes a proactive approach to modernizing aging infrastructure and ensuring high-quality service for its 1.4 million customers.

feed.title: Lowe's Cos. (LOW) Declares $1.20 Quarterly Dividend; 2.1% Yield
feed.summary: Lowe's Companies (LOW) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.20 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend of $4.8. This dividend, which represents an annual yield of 2.1%, will be paid on May 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 22, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of April 21, 2026.

feed.title: NuCana Posts 2025 Results, Highlights NUC-7738 Progress and Cash Runway Into 2029
feed.summary: NuCana reported its 2025 financial results, emphasizing promising clinical progress with its oncology pipeline, particularly NUC-7738, which demonstrated encouraging activity in PD-1 resistant melanoma. The company concluded 2025 with £24.3 million in cash and cash equivalents, projecting a cash runway extending into 2029 to fund its operations. Despite a wider net loss in 2025 due to non-cash expenses, NuCana is advancing NUC-7738 towards Phase 2 completion and regulatory milestones, while refining its development strategy for NUC-3373.

feed.title: Lowe's investors will get $1.20 a share on May 6 after board vote
feed.summary: Lowe's Companies, Inc. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.20 per share. This dividend is payable on May 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 22, 2026. The announcement also details Lowe's extensive operations as a FORTUNE® 100 home improvement company.

feed.title: Equity Residential hikes payout to $2.81 a year, sets June 18 vote
feed.summary: Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) announced an increase in its annualized common share dividend by 1.4% to $2.81 per share, with the first-quarter dividend set at $0.7025 per share payable on April 10, 2026. The company also declared that its Annual Meeting of Shareholders will take place on June 18, 2026. This announcement includes details on preferred share dividends and the record date for voting at the annual meeting.

feed.title: Navigator Holdings Ltd. Announces Secondary Offering of Common Stock by Selling Shareholder and Share Repurchase Plan
feed.summary: Navigator Holdings Ltd. announced a secondary offering where BW Group Limited will sell 7 million shares of common stock. Navigator itself will not sell shares or receive proceeds from this offering. Concurrently, Navigator plans to repurchase 3.5 million shares from the underwriters using existing cash, a move contingent on the secondary offering's completion.

feed.title: FedEx delivers Q3 earnings beat, raises full-year guidance
feed.summary: FedEx Corp reported better-than-expected fiscal third-quarter results, with revenue of $24 billion and earnings per share of $4.41, both surpassing analyst estimates. Following these strong results, the company raised its full-year fiscal 2026 outlook for both revenue growth and earnings per share, reflecting improved profitability expectations. Shares saw a modest increase after hours.

feed.title: Insurance Co. Aflac's GC Pay Jumped To $5.9M In 2025
feed.summary: Aflac Inc.'s general counsel received a significant pay increase in 2025, bringing their total compensation to nearly $6 million. This rise in compensation highlights trends in executive pay within the insurance industry. The article provides a brief overview of this development from Law360.

feed.title: Incyte (NASDAQ: INCY) R&D head exercises options, sells 18,667 shares
feed.summary: Pablo J. Cagnoni, President of R&D at Incyte Corp (INCY), exercised stock options to acquire a total of 18,667 shares at strike prices of $61.18 and $64.25 per share. On the same day, he sold all 18,667 common shares at an average price of $94.24 per share as a routine liquidity transaction. Following these transactions, Cagnoni's direct ownership in Incyte stood at 234,800 common shares, which includes 229,661 shares underlying unvested restricted and performance stock units.

feed.title: FedEx 10-Q: $24B Q3 Revenue, $4.41 EPS — Nine‑month Revenue $69.7B
feed.summary: FedEx reported strong third-quarter financial results with $24 billion in revenue and $4.41 diluted EPS, along with nine-month revenue of $69.7 billion. The company attributes its growth to higher U.S. domestic and international priority yields and increased U.S. package volume, despite separation and transformation costs impacting operating income. FedEx is implementing optimization programs like DRIVE and Network 2.0 to achieve significant structural savings in 2026.

feed.title: Realty Income and Apollo to Establish Strategic Partnership
feed.summary: Realty Income Corporation and Apollo have announced a strategic partnership where Apollo-managed funds will invest $1.0 billion to acquire a 49% equity interest in a new joint venture. This venture will own a diversified portfolio of approximately 500 single-tenant retail properties previously held by Realty Income. The partnership is a cornerstone of Realty Income's private capital initiative, aiming to diversify funding sources and provide scalable equity for long-duration, stabilized assets, while also offering significant cost savings compared to public equity capital.

feed.title: Bank of America Announces Fourth Quarter 2026 and Quarterly 2027 Financial Reporting Dates
feed.summary: Bank of America has announced its financial reporting dates for the fourth quarter of 2026 and all quarters of 2027. The results will be released via press release at 6:45 a.m. ET, followed by investor conference calls which typically begin at 8:30 a.m. ET. Details for participation will be provided closer to each respective date.

feed.title: eBay (NASDAQ: EBAY) SVP sells 12,978 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: eBay Inc.'s Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, Jordan Douglas Bradley Sweetnam, sold 12,978 shares of company common stock on March 18, 2026. The sales were conducted in three tranches at weighted-average prices between $91.51 and $94.04 per share, as part of a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in August 2025. Following these transactions, Sweetnam retains direct ownership of 42,948 eBay shares.

feed.title: UDR Declares Quarterly Dividends
feed.summary: UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR) announced that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.435 per share on its common stock for the first quarter of 2026, payable on April 30, 2026. This represents a 1.2% increase over the annualized common dividend of 2025. Additionally, the Board declared a quarterly dividend of $0.471 per share on its Series E preferred stock, also payable on April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) director buys 2,571 shares in open market
feed.summary: Salesforce director Laura Alber has purchased 2,571 shares of Salesforce common stock in open-market transactions, according to a recent Form 4 SEC filing. She bought 491 shares at $194.54 each and 2,080 shares at $194.5899 each, increasing her direct ownership to 9,530 shares. The filing indicates a positive sentiment regarding the transaction.

feed.title: eBay (EBAY) HR chief Boone Cornelius sells 16,685 shares in planned trades
feed.summary: eBay's SVP and Chief People Officer, Boone Cornelius, sold 16,685 shares of company common stock on March 18, 2026, across three transactions at prices ranging from $91.50 to $93.95. These sales were executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in May 2025. Following these transactions, Cornelius directly holds 94,479 shares of EBAY.

feed.title: Costco $1.50 Hot Dog & Soda: 40-Year Price Freeze & Record Sales in 2025 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Costco's Chief Executive has affirmed that the price of its iconic $1.50 hot dog and soda combo will not change, a price point held for 40 years. This strategic decision is seen as a way to foster customer loyalty, contributing significantly to the company's profits through membership fees, and led to a record 245 million meals sold in the last fiscal year. The article also includes extensive information about an IndexBox report concerning the sausage industry in the United States.

feed.title: Starbucks Corp Stock (SBUX) Closed Up by 3.55% on Mar 19: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Starbucks Corp (SBUX) stock closed up 3.55% on March 19, driven by positive Q1 FY26 comparable store sales growth, increased institutional investment, and successful new product launches. The company's "Back to Starbucks" plan and strategic growth announcements have positively shifted investor sentiment, outweighing concerns like a data breach and an analyst downgrade. Technical indicators show neutral to oversold conditions, while fundamental analysis highlights its industry position despite valuation risks.

feed.title: Navigator Gas plans to buy back half of a 7 million-share sale
feed.summary: Navigator Gas (NYSE: NVGS) announced a secondary public offering by selling shareholder BW Group of 7 million shares, alongside a concurrent repurchase of 3.5 million shares by Navigator Gas at the public offering price. The company will not receive proceeds from the secondary offering, with the repurchase expected to be funded by cash on hand and conditioned on the offering's completion. Despite previous similar transactions leading to positive market reactions, this announcement saw NVGS decline by 6.21%.

feed.title: $1B Apollo deal buys into 500 U.S. retail sites run by Realty Income
feed.summary: Realty Income (NYSE: O) and Apollo (NYSE: APO) announced a strategic partnership where Apollo-managed funds will invest $1.0 billion for a 49% interest in a joint venture holding approximately 500 single-tenant U.S. retail properties. Realty Income will continue to manage these assets, which generate $140 million in annualized base rent and have a 9.1-year weighted average remaining lease term. This partnership is a key component of Realty Income's private capital initiative, aiming to diversify funding sources and maintain financial flexibility.

feed.title: Schlumberger NV Stock (SLB) Closed Up by 5.53% on Mar 19: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Schlumberger NV (SLB) stock rose by 5.53% on March 19, driven by significant positive developments. These include a new deepwater contract for its OneSubsea joint venture, a dividend increase, and plans to return capital to shareholders, alongside strong performance in its digital and data center businesses. The broader energy sector's uplift due to geopolitical tensions and OPEC+ production cuts also contributed to the favorable market conditions for SLB.

feed.title: CVS Health adds John E. Gallina to board, names him Audit Committee financial expert
feed.summary: CVS Health has appointed John E. Gallina to its Board of Directors, effective March 19, 2026. He will also serve on the Audit Committee as a designated financial expert. Gallina brings extensive experience from his career at Elevance Health, including roles as EVP & CFO, and has a background in public accounting.

feed.title: CenterPoint posts audited 2025 results for Southern Indiana Gas & Electric; revenues $921M, net income $150M
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) disclosed its audited 2025 financial results for Southern Indiana Gas and Electric, reporting $921 million in revenues and $150 million in net income. The company saw an increase in revenues from $771 million in 2024, with net income also rising from $147 million in the previous year. Key growth areas included property, plant, and equipment, which increased significantly due to capital expenditures and a major acquisition.

feed.title: MVFG Stock Fund Price and Chart — CBOE:MVFG
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the Monarch Volume Factor Global Unconstrained Index ETF (MVFG), including its current price, performance metrics, and key statistics like AUM and expense ratio. It explains MVFG's investment strategy, which focuses on equity ETFs with strong cash flow and adjusts to treasury ETFs during market downturns, and addresses frequently asked questions about ETFs and MVFG's specifics. The fund, issued by Kingsview Partners LLC, tracks the Monarch Volume Factor Global Unconstrained Index and was launched on March 6, 2024.

feed.title: Why Mosaic Co Stock Is Sinking Fast Today
feed.summary: Mosaic Co (MOS) stock is currently experiencing a significant decline due to a broad market sell-off, which is triggered by an oil price shock and escalating tensions in the Middle East affecting shipping routes. These disruptions are increasing energy costs, negatively impacting cyclical stocks like fertilizer producers. The company faces additional pressure from rising sulfur and ammonia prices, which are squeezing profit margins, and an ongoing U.S. Department of Justice antitrust probe along with regulatory pushback on phosphate import duties.

feed.title: Reverse split at agilon health (NYSE: AGL) targets NYSE compliance
feed.summary: agilon health (NYSE: AGL) announced a 1-for-25 reverse stock split, effective March 30, 2026, with trading on a split-adjusted basis starting March 31, 2026. This action, approved by stockholders, aims to raise the company's share price above $1.00 to meet NYSE listing requirements and improve marketability. Approximately 16.6 million shares will be outstanding after the split, with fractional shares being cashed out.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies Insider Sold Shares Worth $8,578,920, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Keysight Technologies (NYSE: KEYS) recently sold shares valued at $8,578,920, as disclosed in a regulatory filing with the SEC. The sale was reported on March 19, 2026, at 4:09 PM EDT. Keysight Technologies is a company specializing in electronic design, test, and measurement solutions for various industries including commercial communications, automotive, and aerospace.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (FDX) FedEx Corp. Reports Q3 Revenue $24B, vs. FactSet Est of $23.49B
feed.summary: FedEx Corp. (FDX) announced its Q3 revenue reached $24 billion, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $23.49 billion. This report from MT Newswires indicates a strong financial performance for the express shipping leader. The article also mentions FedEx's raised full-year forecast and adjusted EPS of $5.25 per share, exceeding analyst expectations.

feed.title: EBAY (EBAY) CTO Mazen Rawashdeh sells 23,167 shares under trading plan
feed.summary: EBAY's Chief Technology Officer, Mazen Rawashdeh, sold 23,167 shares of common stock at $93.59 per share on March 17, 2026. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b-5 trading plan. Following the sale, Rawashdeh retains direct ownership of 28,915 EBAY shares.

feed.title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend Payment
feed.summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share of common stock. The dividend will be payable on April 30, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 10, 2026. The company specializes in semiconductor solutions for data infrastructure technology.

feed.title: Marine Corps Enlisted Leaders Visit HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding to Advance Veteran-to-Shipbuilding Workforce Pipeline
feed.summary: Senior enlisted leaders from the U.S. Marine Corps visited HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding division to strengthen the pipeline for transitioning Marines into shipbuilding careers. This collaboration highlights the shared values of discipline and technical aptitude between the Marine Corps and the shipbuilding industry, particularly given Ingalls' role in building amphibious warships crucial to Marine operations. Both organizations aim to ensure a seamless transition for veterans, recognizing the vital skills and leadership qualities they bring to the workforce.

feed.title: Marine Corps Enlisted Leaders Visit HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding to Advance Veteran-to-Shipbuilding Workforce Pipeline
feed.summary: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding division hosted senior enlisted leaders from the U.S. Marine Corps to strengthen pathways for transitioning service members into shipbuilding careers. This visit highlighted the natural alignment between the Marine Corps and Ingalls, especially given Ingalls' role as a primary builder of amphibious warships used by Marines. The initiative aims to leverage the discipline and technical skills of veterans, promoting their transition into civilian jobs while supporting the delivery of essential naval assets.

feed.title: Key facts: ConocoPhillips Q1 Call April 30; Buys NPR‑A Leases
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 results on April 30, 2026, followed by a conference call and webcast. The company recently acquired leases in the NPR-A sale, which could lead to increased access to Arctic acreage and potential production growth. This news is significant for traders focusing on COP.

feed.title: Key facts: Jabil Q2 $8.3B/$2.69; raised FY26 $34B/$12.25; BofA PT $295
feed.summary: Jabil (JBL) reported strong Q2 fiscal 2026 results with revenue of $8.3 billion and core EPS of $2.69, driven by demand from data center and AI hardware. The company subsequently raised its 2026 guidance, projecting revenue of $34 billion and core EPS of $12.25. Following these results, Bank of America maintained its Buy rating on Jabil Inc. and increased its price target to $295 per share.

feed.title: FedEx Reports Strong Third Quarter Results
feed.summary: FedEx (NYSE: FDX) reported strong third-quarter results for fiscal 2026, with revenue of $24.0 billion and adjusted diluted EPS of $5.25. The company raised its full-year fiscal 2026 earnings outlook and remains on track to spin off FedEx Freight on June 1, 2026. These positive results reflect disciplined operational execution, increased package yields and volume, and ongoing cost savings from transformation initiatives.

feed.title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend Payment
feed.summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share of common stock. This dividend is payable on April 30, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 10, 2026. The company specializes in data infrastructure technology and semiconductor solutions for various industries.

feed.title: KKR: Lowering Our Fair Value Estimate on Private Credit Headwinds
feed.summary: Morningstar has lowered its fair value estimate for KKR to $115 per share from $140 due to anticipated diminished fundraising and increased redemptions in its credit and liquid strategies segment, stemming from private credit market headwinds. Despite having less direct lending exposure compared to peers, KKR's significant reliance on its credit segment (48% of fee-earning AUM and 31% of base management fees) makes it susceptible to these market concerns. Even with the reduction, KKR's shares are still considered moderately undervalued, though immediate catalysts for movement are limited.

feed.title: Caterpillar Showcases New Industrial Engines and Power Systems at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026
authors: Caterpillar Inc. - Industrial Engines & Power Systems
feed.summary: Caterpillar Industrial Power Systems unveiled new engines and power solutions at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026. This included a higher-horsepower version of the Cat C3.6 engine, now delivering up to 173 hp, and the new C13D engine platform designed for heavy-duty off-highway equipment. Both engines are compliant with EU Stage V and U.S. EPA Tier 4 Final emissions standards and support the use of biodiesel and renewable fuels.

feed.title: Five airline stocks that fly in the face of soaring fuel costs
feed.summary: Despite soaring fuel costs, some airline companies are showing strong performance and dividend sustainability. This article identifies five such airline stocks: Delta Air Lines, Southwest Airlines, Singapore Airlines, Copa Holdings SA, and Deutsche Lufthansa AG. These airlines were selected based on their revenue growth, dividend payments, and the TSI Dividend Sustainability Rating System, which evaluates factors like continuous dividend payments, balance sheet strength, and earnings records.

feed.title: Keysight and AttoTude Collaborate on Advanced Signal Analysis Solutions for THz Interconnect Development
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies and AttoTude Inc. have partnered to advance THz interconnect development for AI and hyperscale data centers. AttoTude is leveraging Keysight's 89600 Vector Signal Analysis (VSA) software, particularly its FlexFrame measurement capability and UXR Oscilloscope, to characterize high-speed waveforms and accelerate the development of its THz radio technology. This collaboration aims to address bandwidth, reliability, and energy efficiency challenges in AI infrastructure.

feed.title: Netflix Stock (NASDAQ:NFLX) Slides Despite Plans to Focus on Originals
feed.summary: Netflix plans to significantly increase its focus on original content, including theatrical comedies and original storytelling, believing unique content is a major draw for streaming viewers. Despite these plans, Netflix shares saw a nearly 3% decline in Thursday's closing trading. The company also refuted recent reports suggesting it has been "dumbing down" content by requiring plot repetition in dialogue.
